text.title: generator-critic-bounded-loop Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for generator-critic-bounded-loop as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Letting the generator and critic share the same model and temperature.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Shared prior — generator and critic make the same mistakes, critic rubber-stamps bad output. Either swap models, swap temperatures, or use a rubric prompt that forces a different reasoning path.

failure-mode.description: Critic returns only a numeric score; loop decides should_continue from a fixed threshold.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The critic has more context than the threshold rule. Force the critic to emit should_continue explicitly so domain logic stays in the prompt, not in caller code.
